title: lathyrus gorgoni subsp. lineatus
intro: Lathyrus gorgoni subsp. lineatus, also known as the yellow peavine or Lathyrus lineatus, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lathyrus gorgoni subsp. lineatus include potential uses in treating various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
